summary: Bug fix verified: Parent shopping list feature is now working correctly. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed: (1) Items are saved with full details (item_name, item_price, image_url), (2) GET returns grouped structure by child_id, (3) Chores created from shopping list are saved to new_quests collection, (4) Children can see shopping chores in their Quest Board.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/parent/shopping-list - saves item with full details (item_name, item_price, image_url)
✅ GET /api/parent/shopping-list - returns items grouped by child_id as [{child_id, items: [...]}]
✅ POST /api/parent/shopping-list/create-chore - creates chore in new_quests collection
✅ Shopping list item status updates to 'assigned' after chore creation
✅ Child can see shopping chores via GET /api/child/quests-new
✅ Validation: create-chore requires at least one list item
✅ Validation: add item requires child_id and item_id
✅ Validation: add item validates store item exists (404 for nonexistent)
✅ Authentication: shopping list requires parent auth (401 without)
✅ Authorization: child cannot access parent shopping list (403)
✅ Frontend: Shopping List page loads correctly
✅ Frontend: Add item to shopping list works (toast: 'Carrots added to shopping list!')
✅ Frontend: Create Chore dialog opens with selected items
✅ Frontend: Chore creation works (toast: 'Chore created! Reward: ₹50')
✅ Frontend: Child Quest Board shows shopping chores with correct details

original_bugs: POST /api/parent/shopping-list only saved item_id, other fields (item_name, item_price, image_url) were None
GET /api/parent/shopping-list returned wrong data structure (not grouped by child_id)
POST /api/parent/shopping-list/create-chore saved to parent_chores collection instead of new_quests, making chores invisible to children

fixes_applied.POST_shopping_list: Now fetches full item details from admin_store_items collection and saves item_name, item_price, image_url, category
fixes_applied.create_chore: Now saves to new_quests collection with child_id, making chores visible to children via GET /api/child/quests-new

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly fetches store item details from admin_store_items collection before saving to shopping_lists
GET endpoint properly groups items by child_id using dictionary aggregation
create-chore correctly saves to new_quests collection with all required fields (quest_id, chore_id, child_id, creator_type, etc.)
Shopping list items are properly marked as 'assigned' with chore_id after chore creation
Minor: Dialog accessibility warnings in console - DialogTitle and aria-describedby missing
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_shopping_list_bugfix.py - Created comprehensive test suite for shopping list bug fix
seed_data_creation: Created test shopping list items and chores during testing, cleaned up after verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopping list bug fix verified. All endpoints working: POST saves full item details, GET returns grouped structure, create-chore saves to new_quests so children can see chores. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_shopping_list_bugfix.py. Test users: Parent Alka M (user_22d32d6b6d43), Child Aashi M (user_cd3928036bf4). Store item used: Carrots (item_2d7c7783cf53, price ₹50).
